name: Cerebras-GPT 13B
archDisplay: Dense transformer, GPT-3 style (40 layers, d_model 5120, 40 heads)
note: Largest of Cerebras' seven-model, Chinchilla-optimal, fully-open GPT family trained entirely on CS-2 wafer-scale hardware.

results.notes: 0-shot; same official HF model card results table that already backs the model's hellaswag/arc-challenge/winogrande/lambada entries (which also lists a 5-shot PIQA of 76.8, not used here to stay consistent with the corpus's existing 0-shot convention for this model).

0-shot, from the same HF model card results table. Note: this falls below the taxonomy's typical openbookqa range (40-50), but it is the genuine value stated on the official model card for this 2023-era 13B dense base model.

verificationNotes: Fully confirmed: March 28, 2023 release date corroborated by Forbes, MarkTechPost, and Cerebras' own press release/X announcement (7-model family, 111M-13B, Chinchilla-optimal, trained on CS-2). Apache-2.0 and 13B params confirmed on HF model card. All 4 result rows (hellaswag 51.3, arc-challenge 36.7, winogrande 64.6, lambada 69.6) verified as literally present, matching exactly, in the HF model card's 0-shot results table (which also lists PIQA 76.6, not included in the input record).
